defect: DP impulse lines sloped wrong for service (gas taps below pipe / liquid taps on top - the classic)
prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: You are on a commercial construction project governed by building codes, submittals, and third-party inspections. The work under review is Transmitter installation, part of the Instrumentation & Controls scope. The observed field condition is: DP impulse lines sloped wrong for service (gas taps below pipe / liquid taps on top - the classic). The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: API RP 551, mfr manuals.
title: Compliance check: Transmitter installation (commercial project)
